description_long: This is a black, pump-action shotgun with a compact, tactical design, featuring a short barrel and a pistol grip instead of a traditional stock. The receiver and barrel are constructed from matte-finished metal, while the grip and pump handle are made of textured polymer for improved handling. The barrel is cylindrical and extends forward, with a tubular magazine running parallel beneath it. The pump handle is ribbed for grip and sits just ahead of the receiver, allowing for manual cycling of the action. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized, enclosing the trigger securely. The overall appearance is utilitarian and robust, suitable for close-quarters use in urban environments.
description: A compact, black pump-action shotgun with a pistol grip, ribbed pump handle, and short barrel, designed for tactical use. The finish is matte and the construction appears robust and utilitarian.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the pistol grip, ribbed pump handle, and parallel barrel and magazine tube.
description_view_1: Front view showing the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the barrel and magazine tube, with the pump handle visible below.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the pistol grip, pump handle, and barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the receiver and the pistol grip, with the barrel and magazine tube aligned forward.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a tubular magazine beneath; no ribbing or venting visible; barrel is short and compact
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
